prompt_en: Drivers must stop at red lights. This is a fundamental rule of the road in Japan.
explanation_en: Red lights require a complete stop before proceeding.
raw_text: Drivers must stop at red lights. This is a fundamental rule of the road in Japan.

prompt_en: Pedestrians have the right of way at crosswalks.
explanation_en: Pedestrian priority at crosswalks is a fundamental traffic rule.
raw_text: Pedestrians have the right of way at crosswalks.

prompt_en: Drivers must display the novice driver sign for one year after obtaining their license.
explanation_en: The novice sign (wakaba mark) is required for first-year drivers.
raw_text: Drivers must display the novice driver sign for one year after obtaining their license.

prompt_en: Overtaking is prohibited at intersections and railroad crossings.
explanation_en: Overtaking at these locations is dangerous and prohibited.
raw_text: Overtaking is prohibited at intersections and railroad crossings.

prompt_en: Drivers must yield to emergency vehicles displaying flashing lights and sirens.
explanation_en: Emergency vehicles have priority on the road.
raw_text: Drivers must yield to emergency vehicles displaying flashing lights and sirens.

prompt_en: The speed limit on general roads is 60 km/h unless otherwise posted.
explanation_en: The default speed limit on general roads in Japan is 60 km/h.
raw_text: The speed limit on general roads is 60 km/h unless otherwise posted.

prompt_en: Drivers must not park within 5 meters of a fire hydrant.
explanation_en: Fire hydrant access must remain clear at all times.
raw_text: Drivers must not park within 5 meters of a fire hydrant.

prompt_en: Drivers must check their blind spots before changing lanes.
explanation_en: Blind spot checks are essential for safe lane changes.
raw_text: Drivers must check their blind spots before changing lanes.

prompt_en: Drivers must reduce speed when driving in adverse weather conditions.
explanation_en: Adverse conditions require reduced speed for safety.
raw_text: Drivers must reduce speed when driving in adverse weather conditions.

prompt_en: Drivers involved in an accident must stop and remain at the scene.
explanation_en: Leaving an accident scene is a hit-and-run offense.
raw_text: Drivers involved in an accident must stop and remain at the scene.
